TEXT.Text: Key to Sagittarius
You need to go back to Sagittarius?
Please be careful And please do not exchange it for a candy. I will keep my eyes on you!
You need to visit Kailon? I hope everything is OK. Please take this Trophy of Victory. You can use it to enter Sagittarius.
You do not need to visit Sagittarius? That is good to hear!
How can I help you?
Talk to Crete
Protector of Stars
Ophiuchus has been corrupted.
Peace will now return to the land.
Serpens is trying to corrupt Ophiuchus, in order to bring disorder to the stars. Pheos has gone to stop him, but I'm afraid he is no match for him. Please go aid him in his efforts, %name%.
A threat to the stars is a threat to the kingdom.
We haven't much time.
Restoration of Ophiuchus.
Persistent Serpens.
They say Serpens is after Pheos.
Serpens will no longer dare come near Pheos.
It seems Serpens is looking for a chance to tempt Pheos. go to Ophichius and defeat Serpens, %name%.
Are you afraid of Serpens?
Please save Pheos.
Serpens defeated.
Crete's lover - Pheos.
Pheos has gone to Ophiuchus to retrieve his research.
Thank you for finding Pheos.
Pheos has left to retrieve his research, but has not returned. Travel to Ophiuchus to find him.
I'm worried about Pheos.
You have not left for Ophiuchus yet?
Pheos' recovery
Restoration of Ophiuchus.
Something must have happened in the stars
Thanks to you, %name%, the stars will soon recover.
Serpens must be hatching a scheme in Ophiuchus. The stars are starting to become misaligned.
I am worried about Pheos.
You have not left for Ophiuchus yet?
Restoration of Ophiuchus.
The source of corruption
Serpens has reemerged in Ophiuchus.
Is he gone for good?
Rumors say Serpents appeared right about the time of Pheos' disappearance. I am afraid Serpents may have tempted Pheos once more.
I am worried about Pheos.
You have not left for Ophiuchus yet?
Serpens defeated.
The disapperance of Pheos
Pheos has gone back to Ophiuchus.
Thank you for finding Pheos.
He left for Ophiuchus a few days ago, but hasn't been heard from since. %name%, please go to Ophiuchus and look for Pheos.
I am worried about Pheos.
You have not left for Ophiuchus yet?
Pheos' recovery
Help Friends
Could it be the three heads that give it strength?
It's good to see you have strong companions.
%name%, you can't face those three heads alone. Gather allies to strike down the Hydra.
You seem afraid.
You do know where Hydra is, right?
Hydra defeated.
The sea serpent's identity
Even a monster has its weaknesses.
It truly did have a weakness.
It may have three heads, but killing one should suffice.
You seem afraid.
You do know where Hydra is, right?
Hydra defeated.
One? Two? Three?!
A monster has appeared in Hydra and has the travelers terrified.
Amazing that it has three heads.
They say it has one? two? Or perhaps three heads. The people are afraid.
You seem afraid.
You do know where Hydra is, Right?
Hydra defeated.
Wretched Perseus
For lovely wife
This should suffice for now.
Perseus' wife must be a dreadful cook. He said he needed to obtain an antidote for it and has gone to Scorpio alone.
Please help Perseus.
There is no time to waste, please be on your way.
Kingspion defeated.
Scorpion poison
Kingspion's Poison also acts as an antidote.
Thanks to you, %name%, I now have the antidote.
Perseus' wife has fallen ill. Ironic that the only cure is Kingspion's Poison. Please help Perseus obtain the antidote.
Perseus' wife is gravely ill.
There is no time to waste, please be on your way.
Kingspion defeated.
Destroyer of Scorpio
Many of those traveling through Scorpio have fallen ill.
The poisonous mist is slowly lifting.
Kingspion has reappeared and been releasing a venomous mist that is poisoning the travelers.
Many travelers are falling ill even as we speak.
There is no time to waste. Please be on your way.
Kingspion defeated.
It is painful to be so beautiful
We received word that Persephone has been taken again.
No rest for the beautiful.
Hades has come back to harass Persephone. Make sure Hades does not trouble her ever again.
You will regret this. Persephone is a real beauty.
I am worried about Persephone.
Rescue Persephone
Hades the skirt chaser
Hades the skirt chaser has appeared again.
Hades will no longer trouble us, right?
They say Hades has kidnapped Persephone. Poor Persephone. Please travel to Virgo and rescue her.
You will regret this. Persephone is a real beauty.
I am worried about Persephone.
Rescue Persephone
The chaos of Virgo
We have lost contact with Persephone.
Thank you for rescuing Persephone.
It has been some time since Persephone sent us an urgent message. Something must have happened. Please travel to Virgo and find out.
You will regret this. Persephone is a real beauty.
I am worried about Persephone.
Rescue Persephone
Today we dine on crab
Heracles has gone to face Kyrab alone.
Tonight, we will dine til our stomachs burst.
Heracles has traveled again to Cancer. Perhaps he had a hankering for some crab. %name%, could you follow him to Cancer? It is too dangerous for him to go alone.
Are you afraid of Kyrab?
Cancer is back.
Minotaur defeated.
Can we eat it?
Can we eat the monster Kyrab?
How can you eat something that big?
Heracles often travels to Cancer to bring back crabs for dinner, but today he has not been heard from. Travel to Cancer and assist him.
Are you afraid of the Kyrab?
Kyrab has returned.
Kyrab defeated.
Kyrab has returned.
Kyrab, the monster crab, has reappeared.
Hmm. Is this the same Kyrab from before?
They say Kyrab has returned. I am certain you have defeated it, %name%. Could you travel to Cancer and defeat it once more?
Are you afraid of Kyrab?
Kyrab has returned.
Kyrab defeated.
Hear me out.
Europa is so forgetful.
Now, Europa will come to her senses.
Even though I have tried to reason with Europa, she keeps forgetting who I am. You will just have to teach Europa and Minotaur a lesson, %name%.
The stars themselves may be in grave danger.
Please go before Minotaur becomes more violent.
Minotaur defeated.
Calm down, Friend.
I wonder what Europa is doing.
How long will this peace last?
Minotaur is on a rampage, but Europa has no intention of putting an end to it. Please, put an end to Minotaurs violence, %name%&%
The stars themselves may be in grave danger.
Please go before Minotaur becomes more violent.
Minotaur defeated.
Wild bull.
They say Minotaur is on a rampage.
Thanks to you, %name%,
Taurus is becoming unstable due to the Minotaur's rampage. Please go to Taurus and put an end to his antics.
The stars themselves may be in grave danger.
Please go before the Minotaur becomes more violent.
Minotaur defeated.
Galaxy Guardian Cloak
Are you ready?
Look! The power of the stars themselves flow through the cloak.
Hand me the Black Dragon Lord's Essence and the Ophiuchus Star Fragment. It will take absolute concentration to attune the power of these two.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Did you bring the Black Dragon Lord's Essence?
Black Dragon Lord's Essence (Wing)
Ophiuchus Star Fragment
Black Dragon Lord's Essence
In order to obtain Black Dragon Lord's Essence, you will need Black Dragon Lord's equipment.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Bring me the Wing of Black Dragon Lord. I will extract the essence From it for you.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Where is the Wing of Black Dragon Lord?
Wing of Black Dragon Lord
Galaxy Guardian Shoes
They say the Shoes of Black Dragon Lord are the symbol of swiftness.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Give me the Shoes of Black Dragon Lord. I will give you back the Black Dragon Lord's Essence.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your swiftness.
[Hero] Shoes of Black Dragon Lord
Protector of Stars (Gloves)
They say the Gloves of Black Dragon Lord are the symbol of sharpness.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Give me the Gloves of Black Dragon Lord I will give you back the Black Dragon Lord's Essence.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your sharpness.
[Hero] Gloves of Black Dragon Lord
Protector of Stars (Shoulder)
They say the Black Dragon Lord's Shoulderguards are the symbol of self-sacrifice.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Give me the Black Dragon Lord's Shoulderguards I will give you back the Black Dragon Lord's Essence.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your spirit of self-sacrifice.
[Hero] Shoulderguards of Black Dragon Lord
Protector of Stars (Bottom)
They say the Bottom of Black Dragon Lord is the symbol of toughness.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Give me the Bottom of Black Dragon Lord I will give you back the Black Dragon Lord's Essence.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your toughness.
[Hero] Bottom of Black Dragon Lord
Protector of Stars (Top)
They say the Top of Black Dragon Lord is the symbol of valor.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Give me the Top of Black Dragon Lord I will give you back the Black Dragon Lord's Essence.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your valor.
[Hero] Top of Black Dragon Lord
Protector of Stars (Helmet)
They say the Helmet of Black Dragon Lord is the symbol of Wisdom.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
Please give me a moment. I need to fully concentrate, for this is my first time actually doing this myself.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your wisdom.
[Hero] Helm of Black Dragon Lord
Protector of Stars (Weapon)
They say the Weapon of Black Dragon Lord is the symbol of courage.
Phew... the Black Dragon Lord's Essence has been stored safely
I have heard the Weapon of Black Dragon Lord contains the most powerful magic. This might take some time.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Show me your courage.
[Hero] Weapon of Black Dragon Lord
The Dungeon of Ophiuchus Cleared
Peaceful Port of Winds

How strange. It was not long ago the kingdom faced a financial crisis because people could not pay their taxes. Recently, the merchants have paid off their overdue taxes and Port of Winds is bustling with activity.
It is good that with the restoration of the climate everything has returned to normal.

I am curious as to why the wind of prosperity is blowing again through the Port of Winds. It would seem people are flocking in, attracted by the goods of the highest quality produced by the merchants. Go speak with the merchants and find out the reason why.
All that I am asking is for you to speak with the people in town. Is that too much to ask?
Is that all? They did not speak of other matters?
I am not sure why, but high quality ingredients are pouring in at low prices. In return, we can make copious amounts of great food and offer them at low prices as well.
Since I can make them with the best ores, people are buying up my superb wares. Thanks to the increased sales, I have been able to pay off my overdue taxes.
Grand Wizard Gwen's astrology readings have been spot on. We are mining lots of high quality ores and enjoying a rich harvest.
Now that the stars have been realigned, astrological readings are correct once again. That puts my mind at ease.
The stars have been realigned. The crops and livestock are growing well.
Talk to <Brutus> the Chef
Talk to <Davi> the Blacksmith
Talk to <Meister> the Production Master
Talk to <Gwen> the Grand Wizard
Talk to <Jeremy> the Great Sage
The Unified Key
Thanks to your efforts, all 5 keys have been collected. However, you cannot enter Ophiuchus with those 5 keys.
You have completed the Constellation Ring. You may now proceed to Ophiuchus.
If you combine the 5 keys, you can create the Constellation Ring. Only this rign will let you pass into Ophiuchus. Combine the 5 keys together and bring me the resulting Constellation Ring.
If you do not combine the 5 keys, you cannot enter Ophiuchus.
Where is the Constellation Ring?
Constellation Ring
Protector of Stars
Thanks to you, %name%, Pheos has recovered and the stars have realigned. Please take this as my show of gratitude.
If you bring me the proof that you have defeated the Black Dragon Lord, I will extract the magic and purify it.

In order to forge Protector of Stars equipment, we need strong magic. Only the strongest magic can contain the power of the Stars themselves. Therefore, using the Black Dragon Lord's magic might be the only way.
Return to me anytime and I will reward you.
Conversation with Crete
In Search of Pheos
Thanks to your efforts, all 5 keys have been collected. You may now enter Ophiuchus.
Thanks to you Pheos has recovered, and the stars are realigning themselves, %name%. You have my gratitude.
Use the Constellation Ring and enter Ophiuchus, %name%. Pheos is there. Please save Pheos, you are the only one who can.
Is there no one who can stop the spread of chaos?
You are the only one who can save Pheos and restore order.
Pheos' Recovery
I am not sure why, but high quality ingredients are pouring in at low prices. In return, we can make copious amounts of great food and offer them at low prices as well.
Since I can make them with the best ores, people are buying up my superb wares. Thanks to the increased sales, I have been able to pay off my overdue taxes.
Grand Wizard Gwen's astrology readings have been spot on. We are mining lots of high quality ores and enjoying a rich harvest.
Now that the stars have been realigned, astrological readings are correct once again. That puts my mind at ease.
The stars have been realigned. The crops and livestock are growing well.
Talk to <Davi> the Blacksmith
Talk to <Meister> the Production Master
Talk to <Gwen> the Grand Wizard
Talk to <Jeremy> the Great Sage
Tax income is dropping more and more. I have heard that the harvest is looking bad also. This could be a problem..
The stars themselves are in chaos because Pios is missing. Please help us.
Please help us.
I pray that Pios is well.
Why did you leave me? Because I have an incurable disease? cough cough.
Oh no! The kingdom's finances are in ruins because of this loss of revenue. I have reported this already to our sovereign.
Why are the prices of ingredients so high? The rumours are it isbecause of this freaky weather.
The crops in the farms are dying and the quality levels of minerals are also getting lower.
These changes in the stars........this can't be good.
The constellations are moving and shifting. I'm afraid bad luck would come to us as well.
This weather is weird. I'm worrying about the crops..
Defeat all monsters
Aries Boss Room
Defeat Typhoon
Protect Pollux

[Story of Aries] Phrixos has gone to Aries to get the Golden Ram. The Water Spirit has kidnapped his sister Helle and demanded that Phrixos bring back the Golden Fleece. Phrixos met with Aries and got the Golden Ram, only to come face to face with Typhoon the Pirate who was also after the Golden Ram.
If you save Phrixos from Typhoon, you will get a Golden Fleece, which is the key needed to enter the Taurus Dungeon.
[Aries Myth] There once lived a prince and princess called Phrixus and Helle. Their mother, Nephele was a goddess and they were raised by their father and his wife, the wicked Ino. Once, in a year of bad harvest, their step mother tried to sacrifice Phrixus. His real mother found out about this, and she prayed to Zeus for help. On the day of sacrifice, Zeus' son Hermes sent a Golden Ram. Phrixus and Helle managed to escape by riding the Golden Ram, but Helle got scared during the flight and fell to her death in the sea during their escape. (The sea was renamed Hellespont in her honour)
Phrixus arrived at Colchis, he sacrificed the sheep to Zeus and gave the Golden Fleece to the king of Colchis
Zeus make a star sign for the Golden Ram once it completed its task.
Ugh! Help me. Typhoon the Pirate is trying to steal the Golden Ram!
Hey, you little thief! Give back my Golden Ram!! Or you will see your sister in the Underworld.
But without the Golden Ram I can not save my sister.%% My sister fell into the sea and was taken by the Water Spirits. I need that Golden Fleece to save him.%%
The Golden Ram is not owned by Typhoon and I caught the sheep by luring it with food. I did not steal it. %% Please help me. I am Pollux. I always repay those that help me !!
Thank you. Now I am safe, and I can keep the Golden Fleece also.%% Now I can see my sister. I can not wait!
Crete sent us here in search of Pios. Our world has been in chaos since he disappeared. We are also in search of the Golden Fleece.
What! Really?? I need to bring the Golden Fleece to the Water Spirits, what are we going to do?? ..
Hey.. Wait This small patch at the stomach, the Water Spirits will not know. I will share some of the Fleece with you.
Please find Pios and save the Galaxy from this chaos. Since Pios disappeared, this place has been overrun by monsters.
Hey, it is you! You helped me before.
You helped my again. Hehe.. I met my sister and we are living happily.
My parents disappeared so I must take care of my family.
The Golden Fleece is extremely value. I keep coming back here to earn some money, despite the dangers.
Taurus Boss Room
Defeat the Minotaur

[Story of Taurus] Crete says the Moonlit Key can be obtained from Europa at Taurus. It seems that the God of the Underworld, Hades is bothering her, she may require some persuasion. When Europa saw the Fellowship, she thought it was the henchman of Hades and ran away. Unfortunately for you, she left her Minotaur behind! .
To get the Moonlit Key, you will need help from Europa. Dodge the Minotaur and try to persuade Europa to assist you.
[Taurus Myth] Zeus, king of the Gods, walked the beaches of Phoenicia and saw the beautiful princess Europa, with whom he fell in love. He changed his shape into that of a huge white bull, and mingled with her father's herd. The Princess saw the beautiful bull and approached him. The white bull knelt and let the princess touch him and climb on his back.
Once the Princess jumped on the cow, the cow ran to the sea and swam to island called Crete. Once Zeus arrived on the island, Zeus revealed himself and convinced Europa to be his wife. The name "Europe" was taken from the tale of this ancient princess.
Eek! Now what?!
These must be henchmen sent by Hades. My dear Minotaur, protect me from these wretches.
No..no.. Crete.. We are not Hades' henchmen..
Hah! Do you expect me to fall for your trickery? Do you take me for a fool? Minotaur! Go and crush them!
But..but..we're telling the truth.. Whoa. Better get to safety first.
Eek! Now what?!
These must be henchmen sent by Hades. My dear Minotaur, protect me from these wretches.
Europa. We have met before. Don't you remember?
Hah! Do you expect me to fall for your trickery? Do you take me for a fool? Minotaur! go and crush them!
As forgetful as she is impatient.
Ah.. Are you all right Minotaur?
We came here on behalf of Crete. We need the Moonlit Key in order to help bring Pheos back from his situation.
Crete, you say? Why didn't you tell me in the first place? I just assumed you were sent by that pervert, Hades...
!! (But I explained that already...)
Here is the key, now go help Crete. Should you meet Hades on the way, make sure you teach him a lesson so he never comes near me again.
Ah.. Are you all right Minotaur?
Europa, we are the ones you gave the Moonlit Key to...
What? Back when... Oh That's right. It must've slipped my mind. Why didn't you say so in the first place??
!!! (Phew...What's the Point.)
Gemini Boss Room
Rescue Pollux
Rescue Castor

[Story of Gemini] To get the Comet Key, the Fellowship needs to visit Cancer, but it is among the dark stars and the path is tricky. The only ones who can help the Fellowship are Pollux and Castor, so they need to visit Gemini. However due to the Chaos, Castor has lost her mind and because Pollux is her twin, he is fading fast.
The Fellowship can not reach Cancer without their help, so you need to rescue them from madness.
[Gemini Myth] The Queen of Sparta, Leda, had twin sons, Castor and Pollux. They were very close with each other and resembled each other in every way. However the older brother Pollux was the son of Zeus and immortal, but this brother was only human. They had many adventures together and both were unparralelled in the arts of war. It is said that even the mighty Heracles learnt his skill with a sword from Castor.
But, as many tales do, their story takes a turn for the worse. They met and fell in love with two sisters.. Their uncle, whose own sons were to wed the sisters, sought revenge against the twins. Castor was slain by the uncle. Due to his sadness, Pollux try to take his own life, but his immortality stopped this from occurring. Pollux prayed to his father, Zeus, so that he may be with his brother again. The God-King placed both brothers in the firmament as the constellation Gemini.
Ugh... Little sister. Why is this happening to us? I feel strange.
Big sister!! I think I am losing my mind.%% Since Pios disappeared, something has taken hold of me. Please help me to stop this....

Oh. I.. I am sorry.%% We were not trying to hurt you. We are the Dragon Fellowship from Dragotaka.%% Crete asked us to find the missing Pios, so we are here. We seek the Comet Key, we came here to ask for help, but since you attacked us, we had to defend ourselves.
Really? You are also looking for Pios....

Then I can help you to reach Cancer.%% Cancer is among the dark stars and the path is tricky. It will be best if I lead you there, but I have to look after my sister.%% Take my Compass, you will find your way with this.%% Please find Pios, then my sister will be ok. Please help us.
Oh.....little sister%% When will this chaos stop????
Cancer Boss Room
Defeat Crab monster Keyrab
Help Heracles Survive

[Story of Cancer] The Fellowship reach Cancer by using the compass they received at Gemini in search of the Comet Key . At the Cancer Dungeon, the Fellowship encounter Heracles, there looking for a ingredients for Boiled Crab. The Fellowship inform Heracles that someone has thrown the stars themselves into a state of chaos. Without warning, the giant crab, Keyrab, attacks our heroes!
To continue on to the Ophiuchus Dungeon, the Comet Key is required. Team with Heracles to defeat Keyrab to obtain Comet Key.
[Cancer Myth] Heracles was born of the union of Zeus and a mortal woman. Zeus's wife Hera hated Heracles and ordered King Eurystheus to make Heracles complete the 12 legendary Labours. One of them was to slay the great beast, Hydra. During the battle Hera sent a large crab to distract him from the battle and it managed to grab hold of his toe. However Heracles stepped on the crab and crushed it. Hera turned the crab as a constellation as a reward for completing its task.
Who are you people? I don't recognize any of you.
We are here to retrieve the Comet Key. We heard it can be obtained by defeating the monster Kyrab.
Well, this is definitely good news. I was about to hunt a monster crab for dinner myself. You can just stand back and enjoy the show.
Hey ugly! Are you ready to become my dinner?

(This one is tougher than I expected...but I can't lose face in front of them.) Whoa.. This one is putting up quite a fight! But, no need to help. Just stay back and keep watching. (...I wish they would help out just a little...)
We can't let you fight alone. Here we go!!
Hey ugly! Are you ready to become my dinner?
Is this the life of a hero? Fighting monster crabs day in and day out?
Heracles, we will help.
(Saved by the bell)

Thanks to you, that monster crab was no match for me. Say.. You are not from this world, are you? Are you heroes from a different world? (This could be a great addition to the tales of my exploits. Heracles saves other-wordly heroes from the deadly Kyrab)
We are a Dragotaka expedition in search of Pheos of Ophiuchus. You are the hero Heracles from the mythology! (Hmm...not as strong as the legends say...)
Ha ha ha!!! So, you know me. (My reputation precedes me)
Did you happen to see Pheos? I've heard many rumors about him recently. So, there really is a problem.
We came here on behalf of Crete. To help bring back Pheos from his predicament.
I see. If you need my help, come visit me anytime. I will gladly help, as I owe Pheos a debt as well.
Ha ha ha! Not even a bit-size morsel. (My Back..! I'm getting too old for this.)
Thanks to Heracles we have obtained the Comet Key.
Leo Boss Room
Defeat Giant Lion Cleonae
Heracles must survive!
Obtain Unicorn's Horn

[Story of Leo] To enter Ophiuchus, a Blue Star Key is required. To obtain this key, you need to meet with Persephone at Virgo. However to protect Persephone her mother, Demeter, placed a strong seal upon the Dungeon. To break and enter the seal, you require a Unicorn's Horn. The Unicorn's Horn is known as a symbol of purity and it is protected by the Giant Lion Cleonae.
If you defeat Cleonae, you will able to obtain the Unicorn's Horn. Heracles is also at Leo to obtain the Lion Pelt. Work together to defeat Cleonae.
[Leo Myth] Heracles was born of the union of Zeus and a mortal woman. Zeus's wife Hera hated Heracles and ordered King Eurystheus to make Heracles complete the 12 legendary Labours. One of the task was to bring back the skin of the Nemean lion. The skin of this lion was as hard as any armor, and it killed all the animals in the area and had started to attack the people also. After a furious battle Heracles managed to strangle and kill the lion. He used the lion's own claw to cut its pelt away and he wore it as his armour from that point on. Hera placed the lion amongst the stars as a reward for completing its task.
Who are you?%% Please help me!
I am a Heracles, mightiest warrior in all the lands, but even I find it difficult to face the lion alone.%% If you help me, I will add you to my memoirs.
(None should hear that this lion gave my troubles......)
There are so many people who wish to get his fur. But you are after the Unicorn's Horn?
Ok, let's work together. Here we go!!!
Unbelievable! We have defeated the giant lion...%% You warriors are not from these islands. Are you guys heroes from adifferent world?
(This would make a great chapter for my autobiography! "The hero Heracles help heroes from another world by facing Cleonae!!")

We are the Fellowship from Dragotaka, and we are looking for Pios from Ophiuchus.%% We are here for the Unicorn's Horn that the lion is protecting.%% You are the hero Heracles from the Mythology? ( He is very weak.. )
Hahaha!! So you know who I am. I just need the fur of the lion. You can have the Unicorn's Horn. (My fame is everywhere....)
You need an Unicorn's Horn? Are you going to Virgo?
There are henchman of Hades, God of the Underworld, everywhere so you must be careful.%% Be safe. If we meet again, I will proudly fight at your side.
Giant Lion Pelt will make me invulnerable!
There are so many people asking for it......such a bother.%% I am hero! I can not ignore such cries for help...
Virgo Boss Room
Rescue Persephone

[Story of Virgo] To obtain the Blue Star Key, the Fellowship went to meet Persephone. However Virgo was overrun by monsters from the Underworld. These monsters are here to kidnap Persephone under order from Hades, the god of the Underworld. Persephone was well known for her beauty and Hades desires her as his own.
If Persephone is kept safe from Hades, she will reward you with the Blue Star Key.
[Virgo Myth] Demeter was the goddess of the harvest, and the mother of the beautiful goddess Persephone, the goddess of Spring. One day, while out picking wildflowers, she noticed a bloom more exquisite than any she had seen before. As she reached to pick the flower, the earth collapsed beneath her and she tumbled in to the realm of Hades. Demeter heard her daughter's scream and, though she searched the world itself, she could not find her. Helios, God of the Sun, told her that Hades had kidnapped Persephone. As result of her grief, Demeter decided to hide away and, as a result, living things ceased to grow and began to die. Under pressure from Zues, Hades had no choice but to let Persephone go. But Hades first fed her a pomegranate and she ate some. There is rule that says if you eat food from the Underworld, they will be bound to that realm. As a result Persephone was bound to spend one third of each year in the Underworld. While Persephone is in the Underworld, Demeter falls once again into meloncholy; that period is called winter.
Help! Anybody! Please save me from these horrible monsters.
Thank you, you have saved my life. You don't seem to be from this world. Where do you come from?
Persephone. We have come from the world of Dragotaka to cure Pheos of Ophiuchus. We require the Blue Star Key to get there.
If it is the Blue Star Key you seek, I have it. You may take it with you if you wish.
Ever since Pheos started to act strange, Hades and his henchmen have been pestering me more and more. Please, Cure Pheos of whatever it is that's ailing him.
Once again, you have helped us. Thank you.
Pegasus Boss Room
Protect Pegasus

[Story of Pegasus] To obtain the Green Star Key, the Fellowship must travel to Scorpio. However the Scorpio is a realm of poison and to enter the Dungeon, a flying horse, Pegasus is needed. When the Dragonicans arrive, monsters have already attacked and injured Pegasus, and brave Peruses is trying to protect the horse. These monsters are henchman of Hades, and Hades is looking to capture Pegasus.
Team with Perseus to protect noble Pegasus from these monsters.
[Pegasus Myth] Medusa was originally a beautiful woman, cursed by Athena for her disrespect. Perseus defeated and beheaded Medusa and her blood, when it hit the sea, gave birth to the noble Pegasus.
Bellerophon later tamed and rode Pegasus, he defeated the monster Chimera and many other great adventures. However, Bellerphon's pride would prove to be his downfall.Believing himself a god, Bellerophon headed for Mount Olympus, home of the gods, on Pegasus and Zeus sent a bee to sting Pegasus. Bellerophon fell to his death but Pegasus rose to his new home amongst the stars.
No!! Pegasus..%% I need your help to cure my wife who has been poisoned.
Hello. What is going on?%% We require the assistance of Pegasus... Seems first that Pegasus requires assistance from us!
Ah! Ok. Together we can protect him.%% Pegasus has very strong regeneration skills, if we can buy some time, he should be alright again.
Oh!! We did it. Thanks for your help, now we must can go on to Scorpio.%%
My lovely wife Andromeda has been poisoned.%% 'Cure a poison with a poison.' To cure her, I need a strong poison like the one used by the monster Scorpion.%%
With this Feather of Pegasus, I can get to Scorpio easily.
Hmm, we are also heading for Scorpio. We seek the Feather of Pegasus.
Oh, ok. There are plenty of feathers for everyone.%%
If we meet again at the Scorpio, I will help you. I will see you there. Thanks again.
Oh, it is you. Nice to see you again. I managed to get the poison of Scorpion and save my wife.%%
Sigh. Actually it was not the snake bite that caused her pain, it was food poisoning.%% Andromeda is not a good cook, but I did not expect it to be this bad. Poisoned by her own food...
But I love my wife. So I can eat the food although the taste is not that great.%% But for future usage, I would like to collect them.
I think I am doomed to do this for rest of my life. (SIGH)
Scorpio Boss Room
Defeat Monster Scorpion Kingspion
Protect Perseus
Obtain Scorpion's Sting

[Story of Scorpio] If monster scorpion Kingspion is defeated, you will able to get Green Star Key. Perseus seeks the Scorpion's Sting to treat his poisoned wife, work with him to defeat the Kingspion. There are many poisonous insects on the way to Kingspion, so be careful. Beware especially Kingspion's sting as it is near to fatal, so avoid it at all cost.
Beware of the sting, defeat Kingspion and obtain theGreen Star Key.
[Scorio Myth] The God of the Oceans, Poseidon and Euryale, Princess of Crete, had a son called Orion. Orion was a giant, but could move with the swiftness of the oceans waves and was able to track and hunt any beast of the land. Orion became very proud of himself and boasted that no creature on the Earth could escape his hunter's eye. Hera heard this and sent a tiny scorpion to test this claim. The giant Orion could not see this small scorpion and was killed with one posionous strike. Hera placed the mighty hunter amongst the stars as a warning to all of the dangers of pride and arrogance.
You monster...I have come to take your venom in order to save my wife.
With this poisonous venom, I can treat my wife. Say..You said you needed the Green Star Key, Right? Here it is. I hope you find Pheos and help him.
Oh, I will never forget what you have done for me. With your aid, Perseus is safe and I have obtained the scorpion's venom.
It is good to see you again. Thanks to you I was able to use the venom to save my wife.
Whew...It turns out my wife had food poisoning. I always knew her cooking was bad, but I never expected she would get poisoned herself!
I love my wife, so I will continue to love her cooking no matter how bad it tastes.
But...just in case, I am collecting the venom of scorpions as medicine for emergencies. It seems I will have to collect them for the rest of my life. (Let's out a deep sigh)
Sagittarius Boss Room
Rescue Chiron

[Story of Sagittarius] To get the Gold Star Key, the final, you will require aid from a wise Centaur. When the Fellowship arrive at Sagittarius they are faced with Chiron who has lost his mind. A Centaur is half human, half horse and they are well known for their combination of human calmness and animal wildness. The chaos bring reduced even wise Chiron to a wild beast.
Once Chiron is back is returned to himself, he will able to help the Fellowship. Rescue him from the chaos.
[Sagittarius Myth] Half human, half horse; the Centaur was, in legend, an unpredictable being. Most were known as leaning more toward the beastial side and were fierce warriors but Chiron has renowned for his intellect. He was a master od medicine, art and hunting. Many heroes, including Heracles, studied under him.
One day Heracles visited the Centaurs. He was so thirsty that he convinced his friend Polos and drank their wine without permission. The tribe were furious and tried to attack him while he was still drunk, but they could not beat Heracles. Heracles started using arrows dipped in posionous Hydra blood. During the brawl Chiron came to stop it but instead he was struck with one of Heracles's arrows. As Chiron was immortal, he could not die, instead he was in constant pain. Zeus found out and passed Chirons's eternal life to Prometheus and allowed Chiron to die. Zeus took the dead body of Chiron and make a star sign.
Oh !! Wh..What happened?? I cannot remember what occured. %% Who are you?? Did I cause you harm?

Chiron, are you OK? You were acting very strangely. I think it was caused by this chaos that is sweeping the Galaxy.%% We are looking for Pios to help resolve this problem. We need to wake the Hydra and to do so we need your assistance. Can you help us?

Yes. Now I remember When Pios disappeared, the whole galaxy sank into this maelstrom of anarchy. Since then many have fallen sick, almost unto death.%% While I dare not compare myself to the great physician Pios, I have some skill in the medicinal arts, I did what I could for my people. But I do not know what is the root cause of this illness.%% I concur, we need to find Pios.
To unleash the Hydra, you will need this harp. I play many instruments, this is the favourite of the great sea beast.
But Hydra is very violent, so I lulled it to sleep, are you sure you must rouse it once again? Once you have what you need fromit, I beg you, send it back to it's rest, and please find Pios.
Oh dear, to lose one's mind...... It seems that I, Chiron, am not as wise as I believed.......
Pheos is not hear yet? I can lend out my harp anytime, Please hurry with Pheos
Hydra Boss Room
Defeat the Hydra

[Story of Hydra] To get the Gold Star Key, you need to wake up the Hydra and defeat him. The serpent was dangerous and almost indestructible so it was sent to sleep; waking up the serpent is, however, your only option. Wake up Hydra using the Harp of the Goddess, defeat the Hydra, retrieve the key and send it back to sleep. That is only way to protect the Galaxy according to Crete.
Beware though! The deadly serpent has many heads, and its heads will respawn as soon as you defeat them. However, its middle head is its weakest. Exploit this weakness and get the key.
[Hydra Myth] Heracles was born of the union of Zeus and a mortal woman. Zeus's wife Hera hated Heracles and ordered King Eurystheus to make Heracles complete the 12 legendary Labours. One of them was to defeat the Immortal Hydra. Heracles went into battle with his cousin Iolaus. Heracles found out that every time he cut off a Hydra's head, it grew back, making it impossible to kill it. Iolaus used a torch to sear the stumps where Heracles removed a head and as a result stopped them from growing back and Heracles was finally victorious. Heracles dug a pit and put the final, immortal head within.
Zeus recorded this victory in the stars.
It should be around here somewhere...
I know how it is around here as well. Huh? The ground is shaking!
Whew...defeated at last. It is great to have the hero Heracles by our side.
Not at all. It was all thanks to Perseus. Perseus is the true hero.
You are both true heroes. Now that we have the Gold Star Key, we can go to Ophiuchus.
Ophiuchus Boss Room
Rescue Pios from the Chaos
Defeat Serpens
Rescue Pios

[Story of Ophiuchus] By combining 5 keys, you can create the Constellation Ring, and you may enter Ophiuchus. Crete ask you to come with her to Ophiuchus. When the Fellowship enters Ophiuchus, they finally find Pios; but not as they remeber him. Luckily, he recognizes Crete and seems to recall himself until the whispering of the snakes that surround him draw him back into confusion and lead him to attack the Fellowship.
Pios needs to be returned to normal or the whole Galaxy will surely perish, destroying the world of Dragotaka. You must find the reason for Pios's change and cure him to save everything from this dark fate.
[Ophiuchus Myth] A son was born to the God Apollo and the princess Coronis named Aescupalius. On the death of the mother, a grief-stricken Apollo took the child to Chiron the Centaur for protection and education. He was first doctor. On studying the world of nature, he discovered how certain herbs and plants contained healing properties. He used these herb to cure people and keep them alive. However the god of the Underworld, Hades, spoke to Zeus about this, saying that soon the world will be overpopulated and the Underworld will be empty. Zeus ordered Aescupalius not to revive these fatally injured people, Aescupalius disobeyed and as a result he was struck down by the wrathful Zeus. Although he disobeyed Zeus, he did so with only good intentions, sand as a reward Zues raised him to the stars.
Snap out of it, Pheos. Your fiancee, Crete, is awaiting your safe return.
What's this? Something is coming out of Pheos?!
You... How dare you make me deal with you myself !! Your lives are forfeit!!
So, you are the one corrupting Pheos. You will pay for this!!!
You... How dare you make me deal with you myself !! Your lives are forfeit!!
Be gone!! Pheos, WAKE up!!!
No!! This cannot be... No!!! You haven't heard the last of me yet!!
You're finally yourself again, Pheos. Why did you suddenly disappear like that? (Sob)
My beloved Crete. All I wanted was to cure your ailment.
While searching for herbs to treat you with, a snake called Serpens presented itself. He told me about a certain healing art that can cure any illness and even bring people back from the dead.
So, I fell for his trickery.
Please forget me. If not, you will continue to fall prey to chaos and confusion.
I will never forget your Love, Pheos. Even in the afterworld.
This isn't the end!!
Kingdom's Financial Crisis
This could be a problem.. because tax income is being lessened, the Kingdom's financial situation is getting worse.
This could be a big problem.. besides the Kingdom's finances, the people will be in for a rough time as well..
Jeremy told me we can't do anything because the harvest is in great doubt as well. So I want you to check how serious it is.
No one cares for their country! Just remember, there are no people without the Kingdom.
Any news? I guess not.. please hurry.
I can't buy any ingredients for my food! Revenue is dropping because the price of ingredients is rising.
To make weapons, high quality iron is needed, but recently I cannot find that kind of quality.That's why revenue has been decreased!.

I have heard from the farmers that this weather is destroying their crops. Iron quality is also getting worse. According to the miners, the Great Wizard Gwen used to cast a horoscope and predict the best time to harvest, but with this Chaos..........

Farmers, Fishermen and Miners. All of them come and see me to ask questions before they start their work, to know when is the best time to go about their business.%% The Horoscope used to tell us when was the best time, and it was always correct. However, recent predictions iare unreliable and the people's yeild is getting less and less.%% I believe Sage Jeremy may know the reason why these sudden changes have occurred.. You should talk to the Sage.

Damn! These horoscope are not showing me anything!!. Hmm. I imagine these recent changes in the constellations could be the reason for it.%% Changes in the stars effect all living things beneath them. And the people are not immune, either. If these changes are not reverted, I cannot say what will happen next.
Talk to Best Cook <Brutus>
Talk to Blacksmith <Davi>
Talk to Production Maestro <Midas>
Talk to Great Wizard <Gwen>
Talk to Sage <Jeremy>
Meteor Strike
I hear people's talking..
There's a fallen stone. Please investigate the place, carefully.

There's a rumor that there's a {C=0xFF7D0000/}meteor fallen{C=0xFF4D0D08/} somewhere in the Port of Winds. You need to investigate the area .%% Since we have no information on the exact location of it, please check the area carefully. If you find the place, please check if there's any possible threat to the village.%% I will count on you. Make haste.
No news yet? I had heard the Fellowship were great adventurers?
I assume the place the meteor fell into was the center of Port of Winds, but reports are varied. The rumour is, this may have created some kind of portal.
Investigate the place the meteor landed
Investigate the place more closely
Crete, Pios' lover
Please help me.
My fiancé, Pios is trapped in Ophiuchus. I can tell you how to get there.

My fiancé, {C=0xFF00863C/}Pios, the owner of 10 constellations{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has disappeared. Since he disappeared, the heavens have been in chaos and the world itself is suffering.%% Pios used to specialize in medicine and guiding the stars. He always tried hard to study new medical techniques. Using his skills, he saved a lot of people's lives and all the people respect him.%% But one day, the snake called Serpentsshowed up, and told him of a mysterious new medicine. Pios had no reason to mistrust this creature. After he learnt how to make this new medicine he could cure more disease that he ever imagine.%% However, Pios started to change. He would not talk to people, and got upset more often. And now he has vanished without a word.
This is terrible. {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}it could mean the end of Dragotaka and the Constellation.
Talk to Crete
Constellation Ring
If you want to enter Ophiuchus and try to find Pios, a{C=0xFF016295/}Constellation Ring{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is needed.
Then, please note the order needed to visit your Dungeons. You need to visit each one in sequence.

This item can be created using key items from each Dungeon.
Among the 5 keys required, the very first key is the Moonlit Key and this drops from Taurus which opens on Monday. {C=0xFF016295/}Comet Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is Cancer on Tuesday.%% Blue Star Key is Virgo on Wednesday. Green Star Key is Scorpio on Thursday. Gold Star Key is from Hydra on Friday.
If you do not heed my instructions, you cannot enter Ophiuchus. Please try again.
Listen to Crete's instruction.
Get Golden Fleece
There is beautiful lady called {C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in Taurus which opens on Monday
Great. You got the Golden Fleece. Now you can enter Taurus.

{C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and I are friends, so if you ask her for a {C=0xFF016295/}Moonlit Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, she would give it to you.%% However, {C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} made powerful wards to protect herself from God, Hades of the Underworld, because he keeps bugging her. To enter inside the Seal, you need a {C=0xFF00863C/}Golden Fleece {C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% The Golden Ram can be found in the Aries Dungeon on Monday, please obtain the {C=0xFF00863C/}Golden Fleece {C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the Ram.
cough, cough.. I have an incurable disease. I have no time.
I assume .. That you haven't obtained the {C=0xFF00863C/}Golden Fleece{C=0xFF4D0D08/} yet?
Golden Fleece
Clear Aries Dungeon
Moonlit Key
Be careful! There are many Minotaurs in the Taurus Dungeon.
You got the first key. I really appreciate it.

{C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} likes {C=0xFFFF0000/}the Minotaur{C=0xFF4D0D08/}the most.%% As I already told you, {C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is in an unstable state of mind, so you need to take extra care when you approach her to ask something. If there's any threat to {C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFFFF0000/}the Minotaur{C=0xFF4D0D08/} which protects {C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will start to attack you no matter what you say.
... Are you serious???
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, please.
Moonlit Key
Clear Taurus Dungeon
Strong Siblings
The second Key is the {C=0xFF016295/}Comet Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/} which can be obtained from Cancer. But.....
Now you can go get the {C=0xFF016295/}Comet Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

I don't think you can get the key easily because the Chaos surrounds Cancer right now. Also it's your first time in there, right {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?.%% However, {C=0xFF00863C/}The Twins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFF00863C/}Pollux and Castor{C=0xFF4D0D08/} know the place very well.. You should ask for their help.
.. I have nothing to say.
Ah, Pios, I pray that you're safe.
Leading Compass
Clear Gemini Dungeon
Rescue the Twins
Comet Key
If you have the Leading Compass, you will have no problem entering Cancer.
You got the second key. %name%, you are great!

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Monster Crab Kyrab{C=0xFF4D0D08/}has the second key, which is called the{C=0xFF016295/}Comet Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% However, that Monster Crab is really big and it's armed with razor sharp claws. It doesn't show up often, but once it gets upset with something, it destroys everything around it.
... Are you serious???
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, please.
Comet Key
Clear Cancer Dungeon
Symbol of Purity, Unicorn's Horn
The third key is called the Blue Star Key, which can be obtained from Virgo on Wednesday.
If you have the{C=0xFF016295/}Unicorn's Horn{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you have no problem entering Virgo.

I heard that the {C=0xFF00863C/}Goddess of Spring, Persephone,{C=0xFF4D0D08/} holds the Blue Star Key. However, recently Persephone has been concerned with {C=0xFF7D0000/}Hades, Lord of the Underworld{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Hades is kind of aplayboy. he's not only flirt with {C=0xFF00863C/}Europa{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, but also {C=0xFF00863C/}Persephone{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. (I'm really lucky that I have my fiancé.)%% So Persephone's mother, Demeter, placed a strong seal to protect her from Hades. That's why you need the {C=0xFF016295/}Unicorn's Horn{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to approach her. That horn is kept by {C=0xFFFF0000/}Cleonae{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% First, you should go to Leo and get the {C=0xFF016295/}Unicorn's Horn{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Then you can go onto Virgo.
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, are you scared of this challenge?
The stars are being eroded by Chaos at this moment.
Unicorn's Horn
Clear Leo Dungeon
Blue Star Key
You can obtain the third Key, the Blue Star Key, from Persephone in Virgo.
Hades tried to kidnap me again?? My nerves.......

As I already told you, Persephone is really afraid that Hades will try to see her again. I think the Seal seems to be weaker than usual due the Chaos. I'm concerned that Hades may come to Persephone and try to kidnap her again.%% So please go to Persephone and explain the situation to her. And be careful of Hades and his subordinates.
Persephone is a beautiful lady. You're going to regret if you don't help her.
I hope you can see Persephone soon.
Blue Star Key
Clear Virgo Dungeon
Flying Horse Pegasus
The fourth key can be obtained from Scorpio which is opened on Thursday.
Since the{C=0xFF016295/}Feather of Pegasus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} can make your body really light, you can fly over the sky to avoid the poison.

However, the passage to get to the place is filled with poison and you cannot walk through. If you have Flying Horse Pegasus, it would be possible to get there.%% I have to tell you though, that horse is really valuable and there are so many people who want to get it. Especially, as always, beware of Hades... {C=0xFF7D0000/}Hades, Lord of the Underworld{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will not give up on Pegasus and has ordered his subordinates to bring it to him. If you see the horse in danger, please help it remain free.
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you look so tired.
I wonder when there will be true peace... I'll count on {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and just wait for you.
Feather of Pegasus
Clear Pegasus Dungeon
Green Star Key
Kingspion from Scorpio owns the fourth key called Green Star Key.
You finally got the fourth key. Only 1 more to get.

If you have the {C=0xFF016295/}Feather of Pegasus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you can avoid the poison and enter since it can make your body really light.%% However, you should be careful on the path to Kingspion; there are many poisonous bugs.
You aren't scared of scorpions, are you?
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, beware the poisonous bugs.
Green Star Key
Clear Scorpio Dungeon
Wise Centaur
The last key, the Gold Star Key is protected by the many headed Hyrda.
If I can see Pios soon, all of this will have been worthwhile, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

The Hydra is imprisoned because it's too violent. But it seems we need to wake up the monster.%% To wake up Hydra, the{C=0xFF016295/}Harp of the Goddess{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is required. The{C=0xFF016295/}Harp of the Goddess{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is owned by the Centaur tribe's Chiron, who is well known by his knowledge and wisdom.%% If you explain the situation to him, you can get the {C=0xFF016295/}Harp of the Goddess{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
This is the last thing I need see Pios, come on,{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Chiron is well known for his knowledge and wisdom. He's also a master music and medicine.
Harp of the Goddess
Clear Sagittarius Dungeon
Gold Star Key
The Hydra has many heads.
You defeated the vicious Hydra. Now you have all 5 keys! We can make the{C=0xFF016295/}Constellation Ring{C=0xFF4D0D08/} using these 5 keys, and go to Ophiuchus.

Chop off the Hydra's head and another will grow in its place! That's why it's not easy to kill it.%% I don't want to wake it up, but there's no choice. To protect the Galaxy from Chaos, We need to do this. So, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you need to put it back to sleep after you get Gold Star Key.
You really took care of the Hydra.
This is the last key. Come on.
Gold Star Key
Clear Hydra Dungeon
Key to Aries
Have you decided to enter the Aries Dungeon?
I'll explain rest of this later, take this. Here you go.

I'll give you the Bracelet of the Twins once in a week, but only on Monday. This item is necessary to enter Aries Dungeon and begin your quest. I can give you only one, because they are hard to come by.
If you have enough Bracelets, please say so. You need to remember this, you can get this item from me only on Monday.
Talk to Crete
Key to Pegasus
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You did a really good job.
Pegasus is a mysterious creature, and not familiar with people. So, to get close to Pegasus, it's necessary to have this item. Now you can enter the Pegasus Dungeon.
Every Thursday, I'll give you the Spirit of the Unicorn. You will need it to enter the Pegasus Dungeon.
I can give you the Spirit of the Unicorn on Thursday only. Please think about it again.
Talk to Crete
Key to Leo
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you did good job.
This is called the Babylonian Emblem. I have heard that this badge used to be given to those skilled at battling with Lions. You can enter the Leo Dungeon when you have this item.
Every Wednesday, I'll give you the Babylonian Emblem. You will need it to enter the Leo Dungeon.
To enter the Leo Dungeon, you need to have a Babylonian Emblem.
Talk to Crete
Key to Gemini
You have returned from the Aries Dungeon!
Please take this Necklet of Friendship. That should be enough. I'll always pray for your safety.
Every Tuesday, I'll give you a Necklet of Friendship. It's necessary to gain access to the Gemini Dungeon.
There are only few Necklets of Friendship left. I can give it to you on Tuesday.
Talk to Crete
